Visit Summary: On arrival, the venue was clean and tidy, there was good music at a nice volume. When we arrived, there was one couple sitting having food but no staff were present to welcome us. When they did welcome us into the venue, we were told we could choose our own table, but we weren’t told that food and drink menus were on the table for us to view. After six or seven minutes, nobody came to take our food and drink order, so I ordered this at the bar, which I assumed was the process for this venue. The toilets are well signposted and extremely clean inside. Our drinks and food arrived very quickly and seemed freshly prepared. Once the food arrived, the waitress checked in on us, but it would've been nice to be thanked and given a departing comment when we left the venue.

Comments: Date and time of the event were included.Number of guests, pricing, gaming options, drinks and food information were also provided, as well as next steps.

He didn't ask me if I wanted the space to be put on hold. He didn't explain anything about the fee required to confirm the event.He did say that he was going to send an email with all the information provided and the prices.
He explained the prices (venue, gaming, minimum spend, etc) and said that the price per person would be £53 but did not reference my budget.
He just explained the minimum spend.

He slightly explained the room he offered for our booking. He said that it was perfect for a group of 55 guests and that we would have a member of staff with taking orders, so we didn't have to go to the bar.
I received a message of a missing call as I didn't have phone signal. I called back after 10 or 15 mins and could talk with an agent straight away.
I said that it was a staff party. The agent asked about the company.
I said that my budget was £40 per person.
I waited around 5 minutes until I received the email with the proposal.I received the event details, along with prices and next steps.
I would have preferred the agent to give me an option within my budget.
The agent didn't ask for special requirements.I did ask if they had gluten free options available. The agent confirmed that they do.
The agent didn't mention anything about another call at any point.
The agent was nice, polite and informative.However, he didn't ask me if I wanted to make a provisional booking or to put the space on hold.
The date and time of the event were available.
From the moment we arrived Isaiah was on hand to make sure we were topped up. Brilliant day. Thank you

Visit Summary: Overall, my visit to the Flight Club was a very positive social experience that provided a great opportunity for me to spend quality time with my fellow guests. The service of all the staff was very good, they were attentive throughout, ensuring we were happy and always had everything we needed. There was a good range of food and drink, all of which were very high quality. We very much enjoyed all the food we had. It felt fresh and had a good flavour. The atmosphere in the venue was very relaxed, the music playing was great. Some small comments for improvement could be that there was quite a delay between our mains with allergens and not coming out. This delay was over 5 minutes. This meant half of our party were eating whilst the other half were still waiting for their food. If these dishes were delivered to the table closer together, that would have been more appropriate. Also, I believe the welcome could have been slightly warmer, by making more of an effort for it to not feel so transactional. However, this was the only part of the process that felt this was, so it is only a small improvement to be made.

There was a good range of food and drink, all of which were very high quality. We very much enjoyed all the food we had. It felt fresh and had a good flavour. The atmosphere in the venue was very relaxed, the music playing was great. Some small comments for improvement could be that there was quite a delay between our mains with allergens and not coming out. This delay was over 5 minutes. This meant half of our party were eating whilst the other half were still waiting for their food. If these dishes were delivered to the table closer together, that would have been more appropriate. Also, I believe the welcome could have been slightly warmer, by making more of an effort for it to not feel so transactional. However, this was the only part of the process that felt this was, so it is only a small improvement to be made.

The service of all the staff was very good, they were attentive throughout, ensuring we were happy and always had everything we needed. There was a good range of food and drink, all of which were very high quality. We very much enjoyed all the food we had. It felt fresh and had a good flavour. The atmosphere in the venue was very relaxed, the music playing was great. Some small comments for improvement could be that there was quite a delay between our mains with allergens and not coming out. This delay was over 5 minutes. This meant half of our party were eating whilst the other half were still waiting for their food. If these dishes were delivered to the table closer together, that would have been more appropriate. Also, I believe the welcome could have been slightly warmer, by making more of an effort for it to not feel so transactional. However, this was the only part of the process that felt this was, so it is only a small improvement to be made.

I had an absolutely fantastic experience at Flight Club, and a huge part of that was thanks to Justin. From the moment we arrived, he brought such a warm, positive energy that instantly made us feel welcome.Justin went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect throughout our visit. He was incredibly attentive, friendly, and knowledgeable, making great recommendations and always checking in at just the right moments. It’s rare to come across someone who is not only excellent at their job but clearly genuinely enjoys making customers have a great time.What really stood out was Justin’s professionalism combined with his sense of humour — he kept the atmosphere fun and relaxed while still providing top-notch service. He made our whole group feel looked after and added to the overall experience in such a memorable way.Flight Club is already a great venue, but having someone like Justin on the team takes it to another level. If you’re lucky enough to be looked after by him, you’re in for an amazing time. Massive thanks to Justin for making our visit so enjoyable — we’ll definitely be back!

What a great venue! As a dart lover I found this to be a great set up, with different dart games that were easy to follow and understand. The individual dart boards had their own quirky area. As a group of 4 people we throughly enjoyed our 90 minutes session. Pre-booking is highly advised. At £13 pp for the session we found great value for money.We shared a food platter, which was varied and delicious 😋The cocktail menu was excellent and the boys enjoyed beers and fizz.The outside rooftop area was also a nice touch, great space to chill.Whether you are a darts fan or not, this activity is such great fun.We found all the staff friendly and helpful throughout the venue. I'll definitely be returning.
